services.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Weekly cuts, edging, and cleanup. Your grass stays healthy, your neighbors stay impressed.

services.title: Landscape Design & Install
services.description: Turn that bare patch into something worth looking at. Plants, beds, walkways — the whole picture.

services.title: Tree & Shrub Services
services.description: Pruning, removal, planting. Keep the good ones healthy, get rid of the problem ones.

services.title: Cleanup & Debris Removal
services.description: Storm damage, overgrown mess, construction leftovers — we haul it all away and leave it clean.

about.heading: Landscaping Macon Since Day One
about.body: J S J Landscaping LLC handles the outdoor work that Macon homeowners need done right. We show up when we say we will, use proper equipment, and leave your property looking better than we found it. Simple as that.

cta.heading: Ready to Fix That Yard?
cta.body: Get a straight answer on what it'll take and what it'll cost. No pressure, just honest landscaping advice for your Macon property.
